question:
Determine the priority schedule for the shop orders shown below, using the first come-first served rule, if the today's day is 120:
Shop order number | C1 | C2 | C3
Data arrived | 116 | 117 | 115
Date due | 130 | 125 | 120
Lead time remaining (LTR) | 10 | 8 | 5
Processing time remaining (PTR) | 5 | 6 | 4
Operations remaining (OR) | 8 | 1 | 2
Standard scheduled queue (SSQ) | 6 | 2 | 3
Next operation time | 2 | 2 | 1
